name: Real Deal Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Everman, TX offering collateral-based loans, jewelry, and merchandise with bilingual service and competitive pricing.
description_long:
Real Deal Pawn & Jewelry is a family-owned and operated pawn shop located in Everman, Texas, near the intersection of Wichita Street and Rogers Street. The business operates as a traditional pawnbroker, offering customers an alternative to conventional lending by accepting personal items as collateral for short-term loans. The shop emphasizes professionalism and expertise in the pawnbroking industry, positioning itself as a neighborhood-focused alternative to larger chain pawn operations.

The company offers collateral-based pawn loans, merchandise sales, and jewelry services. Customers can pledge items for cash advances, purchase pre-owned merchandise and jewelry at competitive prices, and access same-day or quick funding without credit checks. The business maintains standard pawn shop operations with regular business hours Monday through Saturday, and provides bilingual customer service (Se habla Español), expanding accessibility to the local Everman community.

Real Deal Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through emphasis on respectful customer service, community commitment, and competitive pricing compared to larger chain pawn shops. The business highlights its family ownership structure and professional approach to pawnbroking as differentiators. Customer review data, while limited to one verified Yelp review, praises great prices, merchandise selection, and service quality relative to chain competitors.

As a pawn shop, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash who have items of value to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve temporary surrender of personal property, and customers must repay within specified timeframes to recover items. Limited online review data (one review) provides minimal basis for comprehensive performance assessment. Standard pawn shop economics apply: loan amounts are typically 40-60% of item resale value, and interest rates and fees vary by transaction.
pros: Family-owned and operated, emphasizing personal relationships over chain operations
Bilingual service available (Se habla Español), serving diverse community needs
Competitive pricing explicitly praised as better than large chain pawn shops
Professional approach to pawnbroking with stated commitment to expertise
No credit check required for pawn loans, accessible to those with poor credit
Same-day or quick funding available for pawned items
Convenient Everman location near Wichita and Rogers Streets
cons: Very limited review data (only 1 verified review) provides insufficient basis for reliability assessment
Pawn loans require surrendering personal property as collateral
No website or online presence mentioned beyond Yahoo Local listing
Limited information about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or fees
Pawn loans are short-term solutions, not sustainable long-term financing
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own items of resale value
Individuals with poor or no credit history seeking collateral-based loans
Spanish-speaking community members in the Everman area
Bargain shoppers seeking pre-owned jewelry and merchandise at discounted prices
diagnosis: Real Deal Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers in Everman, Texas who need immediate cash and own items of resale value to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is the extremely limited review data (one review) and lack of detailed information about loan terms, rates, and fees—prospective customers should contact directly at (817) 349-0566 to clarify terms before using the service.
services: Pawn loans on personal items and merchandise
Purchase of gold and jewelry items
